name: Zombie War:New World
short_description: "Zombie World War: New World" is a shooter where players and three AI teammates battle a massive zombie invasion. They must cooperate using skills and strategies to survive and defeat mutants. Intense combat with high-quality graphics and PBR materials providing a visually stunning experience.
detailed_description: "Zombie World War: New World" is a shooting game where you team up with three players or AI to battle against a continuous onslaught of regular and mutant zombies. Surviving alone is exceptionally challenging in this game; any player can be instantly taken down by a mutant zombie, and only the assistance of teammates allows for continued survival. The game utilizes PBR materials to maintain impressive graphics and smooth gameplay. Characters in the game are not only beautifully crafted but also feature AI intelligence that blurs the line between real and virtual, immersing you in a realistic combat experience. Furthermore, the game can handle a large number of zombies simultaneously, creating unparalleled intense scenes. Join us and experience this unprecedented survival challenge!

English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Russian*, Turkish*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Korean*
